title: Mirror Conversation column
excerpt: I have items that are linked between two boards – same item, and I mirror columns back and forth.  Is there a way to also connect or mirror the Conversation column?  We use the conversation/comments to give item updates,…

posts.author: MondayMyco (K)
posts.cookedHtml: I have items that are linked between two boards – same item, and I mirror columns back and forth. Is there a way to also connect or mirror the Conversation column? We use the conversation/comments to give item updates, and right now the two boards house different sets of comments.

posts.author: davin (Davin)
posts.cookedHtml: We are looking for the same feature. Upvoted.

posts.author: MarkP (Mark)
posts.cookedHtml: I too am looking for this feature. @MondayMyco @davin I found and voted on this similar feature request which seems to have a lot more activity. Shared or mirrored updates for connected items

posts.author: hellotimi (David Kalu (Formula Pro - Use formula column results in automations!))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

We recently published a detailed guide showing how to resolve this issue. The guide shows how to sync updates between high level board items and several connected child board items, without the need to duplicate your items across multiple boards.

So when an update is posted on the high level board item, it is propagated down to all the connected child board items updates and when an update is posted on the child board, it is sent to the high level board connected items’ updates. That way, the high level board item aggregates the updates from the child board items and the child board items can view updates from the high level board items.

Here’s the link to the guide: https://community.monday.com/t/seamlessly-sync-updates-conversations-across-connected-monday-com-boards/117493

And here’s a demo of the solution:

https://vimeo.com/1123552566?share=copy

@MarkP @davin @MondayMyco

posts.author: Fortimus_Team (Fortimus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Folks,

I recommend you try our Mirror item Multiple Boards app.

It lets you -

  • Mirror the same item to multiple boards

  • Subitems, Updates(comments) + replies are live synced as they happen

  • You get a complete sync overview of where the item lives

  • Setup automations like ‘When status changes/mirror item to Target Board’

Happy to answer any questions or show a quick demo if helpful! Schedule a call here
